working_on.task: Dynamic Settings integration + Maintenance Mode UI/UX
working_on.notes: All business rules now dynamic via System Settings. Maintenance mode fully integrated with Always 200 strategy.

pending_tasks.notes: overdue-checker.job already queries due-soon items but does not send notifications yet

pending_tasks.task: Set notification polling interval back to 60s for production

pending_tasks.notes: Exists at both src/services/ and src/features/settings/

recent_changes.description: Maintenance Mode: middleware + AuthService check + /maintenance page + Login warning banner + /system/status public endpoint
Dynamic Settings: BorrowModal fetches BORROW_DURATION_DAYS, overdue-checker uses OVERDUE_CHECK_TIME + DUE_SOON_DAYS
System Settings module: CRUD API, Zod validation, Audit logging, Notification routing, Frontend service
Fixed Prisma repository initialization, JWT payload userId mismatch, tsconfig rootDir for monorepo

errors_encountered.error: Vite ESM: ApiResponse interface not exported from @qltv/shared dist
errors_encountered.solution: Use local type from @/types/response.type instead of importing interface from shared package

errors_encountered.error: Admin redirected to /maintenance when logging in
errors_encountered.solution: Middleware must exempt /auth/login, then AuthService checks role after password validation
BorrowItemStatus is a Prisma enum - import from @prisma/client, not from shared
Project uses @/services/api with named export 'api', not @/lib/axios

decisions_made.reason: Consistent with project-wide HTTP response strategy. Return { code: MAINTENANCE_MODE } in body, not HTTP 503
Login page needs to check maintenance status without auth token to show warning banner

decisions_made.decision: Maintenance check in both Middleware AND AuthService
decisions_made.reason: Middleware blocks authenticated non-admin requests. AuthService blocks non-admin login attempts (no token at login time)

decisions_made.decision: Local ApiResponse type for FE services
decisions_made.reason: Vite ESM strips TypeScript interfaces from compiled shared package dist, causing runtime crash
